occurrence_sentence: When Théau and I started Alice & Bob in 2020, quantum computing was already progressing rapidly.

role_in_text: Company focusing on cat qubits for quantum computing.
occurrence_sentence: When Théau and I started Alice & Bob in 2020, quantum computing was already progressing rapidly.
Big players like Google and IBM were making headlines with their advances.
Thanks to the collective efforts of the entire community, and especially our talented team at Alice & Bob and our close academic partners, cat qubits are no longer just a bet.
Boson 4 was launched on Google Cloud for everyone to access and test earlier this year, marking an important product milestone.

For example, we've shown that a quantum computer using cat qubits could run Shor's algorithm with up to [60 times fewer qubits than other approaches](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevLett.131.040602), and 200 times fewer when employing [advanced error correction schemes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.09541).
The full roadmap (available for download) goes into the specifics of the technical milestones and challenges Alice & Bob is addressing.
The full roadmap (available for download) goes into the specifics of the technical milestones and challenges Alice & Bob is addressing.

The whitepaper is designed to help anyone, regardless of their background, grasp the most crucial aspects of quantum computing, as well as understand the cat qubit and why hardware efficiency is so critical. To make it even more accessible, the full whitepaper is available both in a fully illustrated, printable version and as an audiobook narrated by Christopher Bishop.
To make it even more accessible, the full whitepaper is available both in a fully illustrated, printable version and as an audiobook narrated by Christopher Bishop.

Today we're introducing Helium Quantum system, our quantum computing platform, and the first thing worth saying about it is what it isn't.
Today we're introducing Helium Quantum system, our quantum computing platform, and the first thing worth saying about it is what it isn't.
The system runs an 18 cat-qubit chip.
Helium is modular: it can host two generations of chips, which means the experimental protocols you develop today carry forward as the hardware evolves.
The Helium System is not as infrastructure you rent to run your existing algorithms.

Error suppression is the execution of control operations on physical quantum hardware to prevent errors from occurring.

role_in_text: global frontrunner in the race for fault-tolerant quantum computing
occurrence_sentence: Alice & Bob, a global frontrunner in the race for fault-tolerant quantum computing, today announced a raise of €100 million in its Series B funding round, led by Future French Champions (FFC), AVP (AXA Venture Partners) and Bpifrance.

role_in_text: led the Series B funding round
global frontrunner in the race for fault-tolerant quantum computing
occurrence_sentence: Alice & Bob, a global frontrunner in the race for fault-tolerant quantum computing, today announced a raise of €100 million in its Series B funding round, led by Future French Champions (FFC), AVP (AXA Venture Partners) and Bpifrance.

role_in_text: Developer of quantum computers using cat qubits
occurrence_sentence: Alice & Bob is the only player developing quantum computers exclusively with this type of qubit, which the company has pioneered since its inception in 2020.
All Series A investors, Elaia Partners, Breega, Supernova Invest and Bpifrance, returned for the Series B

Nearly half of the funds will be used to finance the ongoing construction of a state-of-the-art lab and production facility, and additional funds will be used to further expand the team, which has doubled in the past year. Elie Girard, Executive Chairman of Alice & Bob, added, “Quantum computing is poised to transform industries, but the engineering complexity has remained a major hurdle. Alice & Bob's cat qubit innovation offers a clear path forward, combining efficiency and reliability to unlock quantum's full potential. This funding allows for Alice & Bob to continue to grow as a company and leading player in the industry.”

role_in_text: supporting the company in their mission
occurrence_sentence: AVP is therefore proud to support the company in their mission to reduce the hardware requirements for building a practical, large-scale quantum computer.
We are thrilled to once again contribute to the groundbreaking work that Alice & Bob is doing to scale quantum computers for real-world applications. Bpifrance

Alice & Bob's work in reducing the energy required for quantum computations aligns closely with our ESG goals, and we look forward to seeing how their technology can solve even greater energy problems in other sectors.
Etienne Moreau, Partner, Supernova Invest
